Lorea & Amy's Recipes
  • List

Ninja Foodi Turkey Breast

Want to hear the creator's life story? Click here.
Yield 8 servings
Preparation time 10m
Cook time 55m
Total time 1h 10m
Ingredients
  • 1 boneless turkey breast, approx 3 lbs, frozen
  • 1 Cup water
  • 2 Tbsp melted butter
  • 1 Tbsp garlic and herb seasoning, plus more to taste
Instructions
  1. Place roasting rack in the pressure cooker and add water.
  2. Season the breast evenly along the top and place turkey on the rack, skin side up. Pressure cook on high for 45 minutes.
  3. Once complete, allow to naturally release for 10 minutes, then turn the knob to quick release. NOTE - Check the temperature once pressure has released. Depending on how thawed/frozen your turkey was going in, it might need more or less time. We will continue to cook the turkey for a little longer in the air fryer in the next step, but it has to be 165°F to serve safely! If you feel it won't be up to temp after the next step, you can use the pressure cooking setting again in 5 minute intervals until it's closer.
  4. Brush the turkey with melted butter, sprinkle additional seasoning over the turkey if desired, then cook on the airfry setting at 400° for an additional 6-8 minutes or until golden brown.
  5. Lift rack from the Foodi and let rest for 5 minutes before carving and serving.
